PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CPF-25-023176 AND CPF-25-519063 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: granted. The People's moving papers satisfy its summary judgment burden of showing that it is entitled to forfeiture of all the property sought to be forfeited to the State of California. Although he was served with the moving papers, claimant Jonathan Ratcliff has not filed any opposition papers, thereby requiring entry of summary judgment in favor of the People for the forfeiture of all the property sought to be forfeited to the State of California for this case. Proposed order and proposed judgment are submitted for review. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Victoria Robinson And Maite Kvarna In Support Thereof; Exhibits; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for order deeming its first set of requests for admissions admitted by claimant Jonathan Ratcliff is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court will sign the previously submitted proposed order.

Order submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-25-023176 WITH CASE CPF-25-519063
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-25-023176 WITH CASE CPF-25-519063.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to consolidate cases CPF-25-023176 and CPF-25-519063 is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Case 519063 is the lead case and all further filings will be in that case only.

Order submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
